title: Creamy Kicked Shrimp Zanzibari Chowder
description: A briny, light weeknight Malaysian dish featuring coconut milk and deglazed with shrimp for a tropical twist. Lacto-vegetarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh shrimps, peeled and deveined

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add garlic and onion; sauté until soft.
Deglaze with 1/4 cup of the broth. Scrape up any browned bits from bottom of pot.
Stir in remaining broth, tomatoes, turmeric, fish sauce, coconut milk, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a simmer then add shrimps; cook until pink.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Blend soup using an immersion blender or transfer half at a time to a food processor. Return puree to pot.
